headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Dell Technologies (DELL) After Its 124% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are trying to figure out whether Dell Technologies at around US$185 per share looks rich, cheap, or somewhere in between, the key is to understand what the current price is actually pricing in. The stock has logged returns of 9.5% over the last 7 days, 26.6% over 30 days, 45.1% year to date, 124.4% over 1 year and 369.9% over 3 years, so recent price action is front of mind for many investors thinking about growth potential or changing risk perceptions. These moves are playing out as...
